background: Homeworld: Loki/Sol (C9CA369-C). Carnegie Mellon University dropout. 'Rolo' earned his nickname from his ability to play many roles. Master of social engineering and corporate competitive analysis turned SolSec infiltrator.
education: Carnegie Mellon University (incomplete) - Corporate Competitive Analysis program
terms: Agent (Corporate): Investigate-1, Deception-1, Admin-1. Corporate analyst specializing in competitive intelligence. Advanced to rank 1.
Entertainer (Journalist): Persuade-1, Streetwise-1, Carouse-1. Cover identity as investigative journalist provided excellent access to sources. Advanced to rank 1.
Entertainer (Journalist): Investigate-2, Persuade-2, Deception-2. Built extensive network of contacts across corporate and media sectors. Advanced to rank 2. Mustering out: gained multiple contacts.

Agent (Intelligence): Streetwise-2, Recon-1, Stealth-1. Recruited by SolSec for infiltration operations. 6-month deep cover assignment in Vegan trade communities. Cultural knowledge of Vegans acquired.

Agent (Intelligence): Computer-1, Deception-2. Specialized in social engineering and information extraction. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Advanced to rank 2. Mustering out: Multiple false IDs, Voice Modulator, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Social engineering, building networks rapidly, extracting information through charm, blending into any social environment, Vegan cultural knowledge
Weaknesses: Divided loyalties (Vegan sympathies), moral conflict with SolSec methods, difficulty forming genuine relationships due to constant deception
